creator: dar@darklajid.de
text:
David,

sorry for being a PITA here - I'm just
a) really interested in seeing this move forward
b) plain curious..

With my previous patch (and luasec 0.5, although that should be optional)=20
I'm now successfully running a test server.

- s2s works, as tested with Google (GTalk or whatever you'd call that=20
now..)
- s2s encryption works, as tested by the IM Observatory (think ssllabs for=20=

xmpp) [1]
- c2s works, tested with Pidgin and the IM Observatory [2]

In other words: In my (certainly limited..) experience these patches work=20
fine for the basic functionality. I have no 0.8.x server around to test if=20=

a _migration_ causes trouble, but I think that's outside of the scope of=20
the patch.

Would love to hear your feedback. If I can do anything to move this=20
forward, just let me know.

Regards,
Ben

1: https://xmpp.net/result.php?domain=3Ddar-klajid.de&type=3Dserver
2: https://xmpp.net/result.php?domain=3Ddar-klajid.de&type=3Dclient
